caseStudies.title: Solutions that already work
caseStudies.subtitle: Four real MaOs cases — from camp registration bots to AI content automation for business.

campBot.title: Telegram bot for camp registration
campBot.problem: Registration ran through Google Forms and chats — applications were lost, payments weren't reconciled, and staff replied manually late into the night.
campBot.solution: A Telegram bot guides users step by step: session, child details, payment, confirmation. Statuses sync to spreadsheets and CRM.
campBot.result: 70% less manual work for coordinators, 24/7 registration with zero lost applications, payments reconciled automatically.

crmSales.title: CRM automation for the sales team
crmSales.problem: Reps duplicated deal statuses in CRM and messengers, follow-ups slipped, and weekly reports were built by hand.
crmSales.solution: Two-way sync of deals, tasks, and notifications across CRM, Telegram, and email. AI suggests the next step for every opportunity.
crmSales.result: Zero manual status sync, 60% less routine work, a real-time pipeline for leadership.

aiSupport.title: AI assistant for customer support
aiSupport.problem: Support was flooded with repeat questions, response times grew, and complex cases got lost in chats.
aiSupport.solution: An AI assistant handles FAQs, classifies tickets, drafts replies, and escalates to humans with full conversation context.
aiSupport.result: 94% of routine queries resolved without an agent, first response under 1 minute, CSAT up 22%.

aiContent.title: AI content automation system
aiContent.problem: The team spent dozens of hours on posts, emails, and descriptions — brand voice drifted across channels.
aiContent.solution: A content engine generates batch assets in brand voice with approval workflow and calendar publishing.
aiContent.result: 10× faster production, one brand voice across 5 channels, marketing focused on strategy.
